channel.title: Papers [Under Construction] on Franz Louis Cesista
channel.description: Recent content in Papers [Under Construction] on Franz Louis Cesista

item.title: [Under Review]
item.description: This paper is still under review. It describes a SOTA method for Document Information Extraction tasks (i.e. Key-Information Extraction & Line Items Recognition). The method can augment open-source LLMs by up to 1473% and commercial LLMs by up to 304% on public benchmarks and beating strong, finetuned multi-modal baselines.
